item.name: Piping Hot Pumpkin Stew
item.description:
An All Saints' Wake culinary tradition, this rich, buttery soup is oft served in a hollowed-out pumpkin. This year's batch is undeniably hotter than last year's.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
CP Bonus: +9% (Max 23)
GP Bonus: +5% (Max 22)
Gear Durability Bonus: +2
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
